title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Robin, Saul as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, so your hair was like this back when you first met Saul!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure he'll recognize it and be thrilled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Aw man, reunions always make me cry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You had that style when you met us too, Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Land Ho! The fog is clear and it's smooth sailing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's HUGE!! Even the island is a giant!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's dock and have ourselves a good drink!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's fallen, and he can't get up!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 12 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
